data in this column indicates whether the facility contacted and completed the physician (or physician-designee) prescribed/recommended actions by midnight of the next calendar day each time potential clinically significant medication issues were identified since the admission. 0 = No
1 = Yes
9 = NA - There were no potential clinically significant medication issues identified since admission or patient is not taking any medications.
